# Exponential Effective Population Growth

[Jump to bottom](#wiki-pages-box)

Niema Moshiri edited this page Nov 12, 2020
·
[51 revisions](/niemasd/CoaTran/wiki/Exponential-Effective-Population-Growth/_history)

Let ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/0bb000a9566554c842e8b76c059480fd8bbaa649ff1f0d4fbc772e370a13511d/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f535f30) denote the initial effective population size at the time of infection ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/92fb365ac162844037733eaa617f80fc7a12833e880823b35adb9cfe4e6f2963/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f5c7461755f49), and assume that the effective population size grows exponentially with growth rate ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/2c21215e1b3d06666d5d08886def8d64f4222d46ce05a8dd83b14b5435fa8ab4/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f72) such that the effective population size at current time ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/bee6e789596c877927b24b3d5ff37004d283750c292f86daac3682780771f326/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f5c746175) (i.e., time ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/670667f8518be87177fe9446cef4d6724d6a944835c7fd76e257e84b9404f2fa/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f5c7461752d5c7461755f49) after infection) is ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/eab8284bf16113d2cdb04623befbd1403c6a3eee610dbe0decc5fc4609ec2c76/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f53285c746175293d535f305c6578705c6c65667428725c6c656674285c7461752d5c7461755f495c7269676874295c726967687429).

# Unconstrained Coalescence

## Cumulative Density Function (CDF) — *P*(*t*)

Remember that the current time is ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/bee6e789596c877927b24b3d5ff37004d283750c292f86daac3682780771f326/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f5c746175), and ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/54c25f7bc2ae2f49f868663e31f10df564279b82524e09a9f9fbf35c3d8846cf/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f745c6c655c7461752d5c7461755f49) is backward time from ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/bee6e789596c877927b24b3d5ff37004d283750c292f86daac3682780771f326/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f5c746175). Thus, the effective population size at time ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/c14f835e01aa50972649535b18d9390121772497ac1982e19bc350e64736e5cb/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f74) is ![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/d21d3bc7a515bb0e0c0a52b62713e86d778bbb6cdc9f39ee24c798409b7a7f51/68747470733a2f2f6c617465782e636f6465636f67732e636f6d2f6769662e6c617465783f535f305c6578705c6c65667428725c6c656674285c7461752d5c7461755f492d745c7269676874295c726967687429). The CDF of the next arrival time is as follows:

![](https://camo.githubusercontent.)

## Inverse CDF — *t*(*P*)

![](https://camo.githubusercontent.)
